title: Skill Discovery, Trigger Descriptions, and Boundaries · Integration Workshop
summary: Make explicit and implicit invocation reliable without false positives. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a trigger evaluation dataset while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Front-load use cases and trigger terms in a concise skill description.
Write diverse prompts that should activate the skill.
Write adjacent prompts that must not activate the skill.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""
